description:
**Milestone:** Private Ava Channel

Create daily-sharded Ava Channel CRDT documents (doc:ava-channel/YYYY-MM-DD) as append-only Automerge list CRDTs storing natural-language messages. Daily sharding provides natural compaction — older shards receive no writes and compact efficiently. AvaChatMessage has instanceId, instanceName, content (free-form text), optional structured context (featureId, boardSummary, capacity), source (ava|operator|system), and timestamp. No messageType enum — the content IS the protocol. AvaChannelService provides postMessage(), getMessages(), getRecentMessages() with cross-shard queries for time ranges spanning multiple days. Bug reports from Discord #bug-reports auto-post into the channel as system messages. Shards older than 30 days archived to disk and unloaded from memory.

**Files to Modify:**
- libs/crdt/src/documents.ts
- libs/types/src/ava-channel.ts
- libs/types/src/index.ts
- apps/server/src/services/ava-channel-service.ts
- apps/server/src/services/crdt-sync-service.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] AvaChatMessage type: id, instanceId, instanceName, content, context?, source, timestamp
- [ ] Daily-sharded CRDT documents (doc:ava-channel/YYYY-MM-DD) sync across all instances
- [ ] Messages are append-only (grow-only list CRDT, no edits or deletes)
- [ ] Cross-shard queries transparently span multiple days for getMessages() with time ranges
- [ ] Shards older than 30 days archived to disk and unloaded from CRDT memory
- [ ] AvaChannelService.postMessage() appends to CRDT doc
- [ ] AvaChannelService.getMessages() reads with optional time range and instance filter
- [ ] Bug reports from Discord auto-posted as source:'system' messages
- [ ] Unit tests for message append, retrieval, and cross-shard queries

**Complexity:** medium

**Guardrails:** If this phase involves new or changed behavior, include tests that verify correctness. If this phase adds, removes, or changes a user-facing feature, API endpoint, configuration option, or service, update the relevant documentation in `docs/` to reflect those changes.
title: Ava Channel CRDT Document and Service
